scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter api start:dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter manual-testing dev"
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.dev:demos: concurrently "pnpm --filter social-media-app dev" "pnpm --filter demo-api-store dev" "pnpm --filter demo-job-board dev"
scripts.demo:e2e:flow1: pnpm demo:e2e:cleanup && pnpm --filter e2e-tests run demo:flow1
scripts.demo:e2e:flow2: pnpm demo:e2e:cleanup && pnpm --filter e2e-tests run demo:flow2
scripts.demo:e2e:flow3: pnpm demo:e2e:cleanup && pnpm --filter e2e-tests run demo:flow3
scripts.demo:e2e:flow45: pnpm demo:e2e:cleanup && pnpm --filter e2e-tests run demo:flow45
scripts.demo:e2e:stress: pnpm demo:e2e:cleanup && pnpm --filter e2e-tests run demo:stress
scripts.demo:e2e:all: pnpm demo:e2e:cleanup && pnpm --filter e2e-tests run demo:all
scripts.demo:e2e:help: node -e "const rows=[['demo:e2e:cleanup','Clear stale demo data from all demo databases'],['demo:e2e:flow1','Run Flow 1 free-tier abuse'],['demo:e2e:flow2','Run Flow 2 fake job company'],['demo:e2e:flow3','Run Flow 3 bot scraper attack'],['demo:e2e:flow45','Run Flows 4 and 5 certificate verification'],['demo:e2e:stress','Run abuse and stress probes'],['demo:e2e:all','Run the full demo matrix in one pass']]; for (const [cmd,desc] of rows) console.log(`${cmd} - ${desc}`);"
